name: predictability
description: Interventions that increase predictability, routine, and clarity of expectations

name: communication_clarity
description: Interventions that improve clarity, directness, and safety in workplace communication

name: sensory_environment
description: Adjustments to physical environment — noise, lighting, space, crowding

name: meeting_adaptation
description: Changes to meeting format, frequency, participation expectations

name: schedule_flexibility
description: Flexibility in work hours, breaks, shift patterns, remote options

name: manager_behavior
description: Changes in how managers communicate, give feedback, set expectations

name: hr_process_adaptation
description: Changes to HR processes — evaluations, onboarding, procedures

name: external_resource
description: Referrals to external support — organizations, professionals, programs
